name: TriCity Family Services
message: TriCity Family Services (TCFS) is the leading provider of counseling and mental health services in Kane County, catering to clients of all ages and income levels. The organization offers a wide range of services including family-based treatment for eating disorders, emotional wellness programs, workshops, support groups, and employee assistance programs. With a mission to provide accessible and affordable mental health care, TCFS serves over 4,000 clients each year, accepting most major insurance plans and offering fee adjustments as needed. Established in 1967, TriCity Family Services is committed to supporting individuals and families in their journey toward emotional wellness.
